title: adenocline pauciflora var. zeyheri
intro: Adenocline pauciflora var. zeyheri, also known as Adenocline zeyheri, is a plant species within the family Fabaceae, native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of fever. The health benefits of Adenocline zeyheri include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as edema and urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Adenocline zeyheri typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its roots or leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
